instance.description: The name of the instance in which the repository is hosted.

description.description: Description of the repository, which cannot exceed 500 characters.

initial_config.description: Initial configurations for the repository. Structure is [documented below](#nested_initial_config).

default_branch.description: Default branch name of the repository.

gitignores.description: List of gitignore template names user can choose from. Valid values can be viewed at https://cloud.google.com/secure-source-manager/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.locations.repositories#initialconfig.

license.description: License template name user can choose from. Valid values can be viewed at https://cloud.google.com/secure-source-manager/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.locations.repositories#initialconfig.

readme.description: README template name. Valid values can be viewed at https://cloud.google.com/secure-source-manager/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.locations.repositories#initialconfig.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.

deletion_policy.description: to be abandoned, rather than deleted. Setting `DELETE` deletes the resource and all its contents. Setting `PREVENT` prevents the resource from accidental deletion by erroring out during plan. Default is `DELETE`.  Possible values are: * DELETE * PREVENT * ABANDON
